shorts.content: Marriage is a corporate merger — and divorce is a divestiture. Make sure your corporate cultures align before you merge. You need to understand each other's values, goals, and financial philosophies before you say 'I do.'
shorts.title: She compared marriage to a business merger (genius!)

shorts.content: Rich isn't about income — it's about joy, peace, and the memories you create. Peace is worth more than gold. I would rather have peace in my household than all the money in the world.
shorts.title: This mom redefined what 'rich' actually means

shorts.content: Financial dependence costs more than money — it costs your peace, autonomy, and sense of self-worth. When you can't make your own choices because you depend on someone else financially, you lose pieces of yourself.
shorts.title: The hidden cost of financial dependence (not what you think)

shorts.content: Imposter syndrome often means you haven't found your true purpose yet, not that you're inadequate. When you're operating in your zone of genius, that feeling disappears because you know you belong there.
shorts.title: What imposter syndrome really means (plot twist!)

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What Happens When a Divorced Mom Gets Her PMP in 6 Weeks?
titleOptions.boldStatement: This Mom Went From Divorce to Six-Figure Success (Her Strategy)
titleOptions.numberBased: 5 Financial Truths This Mom Learned After Divorce

description:
From financial dependence to six-figure success — Tiana Reeves proves your lowest moments can become your greatest plot twists.
Her journey from divorce to PMP certification in just 6 weeks will inspire every mom ready to rewrite her story.

⏰ TIMESTAMPS:
00:00 - Introduction
03:15 - The divorce wake-up call
08:22 - PMP certification in 6 weeks
15:30 - Redefining what 'rich' really means
22:45 - Teaching kids financial literacy
28:10 - Marriage as a corporate merger
35:20 - Building a movement for corporate moms

🔥 KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• Rich isn't about income—it's about joy, peace, and memories
• Financial dependence costs more than money—it costs your peace
• Imposter syndrome means you haven't found your purpose yet
• Marriage should be treated like a corporate merger
• Start with what you enjoy to find your purpose

🤝 CONNECT WITH TIANA:
🔗 Website: https://www.getinnov8it.com/
💼 LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tiana-reeves-pmp-pmi-acp-cssbb-2080427/

📺 SUBSCRIBE: https://www.youtube.com/@themanageher
🎧 PODCAST: https://themanageher.com/podcast
📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/the-leadership-legacy-most-moms-are-accidentally-destroying

#WomenLeaders #FinancialFreedom #MomSuccess #Divorce #CareerChange #PMP #WomenInBusiness #Leadership #FinancialLiteracy #Empowerment

communityPosts.content:
Tiana Reeves said: "Marriage is a corporate merger — and divorce is a divestiture." 

What's the most important thing to align before marriage?

A) Financial goals & spending habits 💰
B) Career ambitions & life timeline 📈
C) Values & family priorities ❤️
D) Communication styles & conflict resolution 🗣️

Comment below with your choice and why! 👇

"Rich isn't about income — it's about joy, peace, and the memories you create." - Tiana Reeves

This hit different. 💯

Tiana went from financial dependence and divorce to passing her PMP certification in 6 weeks and building a six-figure business. Her definition of wealth? Peace in your household over any amount of money.

What does being "rich" mean to YOU? Let me know in the comments! ⬇️

#WealthMindset #WomenLeaders #PeaceOverProfit
